pkgmetadata.longdescription: rinoh-typeface-texgyreherosThis package provides the TeX Gyre Heros_ typeface for use with rinohtype_.TeX Gyre Heros is based on URW Nimbus Sans L and can be used as a replacementfor Helvetica... _TeX Gyre Heros httpwww.gust.org.plprojectse-foundrytex-gyreheros.. _rinohtype httpsgithub.combrechtmrinohtypereadme
